nav.aboutBlurb: Ánima Village brings together over 84 exclusive brands, gastronomic experiences, wellness studios, and cafes. A space that celebrates the best of life: nature, wellness, gastronomy, art, and community.

about.title: About
about.metaDescription: Ánima Village is a neighborhood and retail destination dedicated to exclusive brands, wellness, art, nature and community.
about.heroP1: Ánima Village brings together over 84 exclusive brands, gastronomic experiences, wellness studios, and cafes.
about.heroP2: A space that celebrates the best of life: nature, wellness, gastronomy, art, and community. Each corner is an invitation to enjoy the moment and be present.
about.essenceP1: A SOMA Group destination, designed by Sordo Madaleno.
about.essenceP2: Located at the heart of Cabo Del Sol, we are inspired by the essence of a local village, creating a place that elevates the senses and celebrates the beauty of the natural environment.
about.essenceP3: We offer a holistic experience where retail, dining, art, culture, and nature intertwine to form a space full of life and connection.
about.closing: We can't wait for you to be part of this story
